briefs.title: BC Trucking Firms Can Now Use Approved Traction Devices Instead of Chains on Winter Roads
briefs.summary: BC updated its Motor Vehicle Act rules to let commercial carriers (trucking companies) use ministry-approved traction devices in place of chains when chain-up signs are posted, as long as they meet specific conditions.
briefs.action_required: Check with BC's Ministry of Transportation to apply for written authorization to use traction devices on your commercial vehicles.
